## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds capability)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing API behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
